title: Wheelchairs
description: Fully-customisable assistive devices, for roleplay or disability representation purposes!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/z3kZpEGB9Hw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Minecraft has never had a great deal of options for disabled gamers to see themselves reflected in our cubic world or for roleplayers to portray disabled characters. Up until now, the closest things to a wheelchair were boats and minecarts, but it was always impossible to stay in them all the time without sacrificing crucial gameplay mechanics like portal travel or sprinting.

This mod aims to rectify this absence by providing a customisable wheelchair vehicle with an especial focus on long-term use and minimal detriment. And while some things are harder to do in a wheelchair than not, you can do almost everything a non-wheelchair user can do. Wheelchairs are fully capable of sprinting, teleporting, sneaking, flying, benefiting from beacon effects, and travelling through portals.

Additionally, special care has been given to ensuring that you are almost never separated from your vital mobility aid. When a wheelchair user dies, their wheelchair respawns with them, and will even do so if the user enters Spectator mode! The chairs themselves are indestructible, though not so in their item form.

Add a chest to your chair for some onboard storage, or a furnace minecart to make it automatically follow wherever you look with a chair controller! Lastly, give it an appearance that reflects you by choosing the material and colour of the seat and mix-and-matching the wheels!
